description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Create lib/specled_ex/review.ex with build_view(index, root, opts) returning a structured view-model map ready for the renderer. Pulls from ChangeAnalysis.analyze (HEAD vs base), Verifier.verify (findings + claims), per-subject extraction of bindings via EffectiveBinding, code-changes grouped by subject (which files changed map to which subjects via Coverage.subject_file_map), unmapped files for the misc panel, decisions touched by the change.

Also create lib/specled_ex/review/file_diff.ex — a helper that shells out to `git diff` (unified format) for a given (base_ref, head_ref, paths) and parses hunks into structured form: %{file, hunks: [%{old_start, new_start, lines: [{:ctx | :add | :del, content}]}]}. Used by the renderer for both the misc panel and code-change tabs.
title: Build view-model assembly + file-diff helper
